meta.summary: Logomaker 0.8.7 Python runtime with a small TAFFISH helper CLI for creating sequence-logo figures from matrices, aligned FASTA files, and upstream demo data.
meta.description: Logomaker 0.8.7 Python runtime with a small TAFFISH helper CLI for creating sequence-logo figures from matrices, aligned FASTA files, and upstream demo data.

test: test "$(python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; print(md.version("logomaker"))')" = '0.8.7' && python -c 'import logomaker, matplotlib, numpy, pandas; import importlib.metadata as md; print(md.version("logomaker"))' | grep -Fx '0.8.7' >/dev/null && logomaker --version | grep -Fx 'logomaker 0.8.7' >/dev/null

logomaker --help | grep -F 'Create sequence logos with Logomaker' >/dev/null && logomaker matrix --help | grep -F 'Render a logo from a TSV matrix' >/dev/null && logomaker alignment --help | grep -F 'Render a logo from an aligned FASTA file' >/dev/null && logomaker demo --help | grep -F 'Render an upstream Logomaker demo figure' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-logomaker-matrix-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf 'pos	A	C	G	T
0	0.70	0.10	0.10	0.10
1	0.10	0.70	0.10	0.10
2	0.10	0.10	0.70	0.10
3	0.10	0.10	0.10	0.70
' > "$tmp/matrix.tsv"; logomaker matrix --input "$tmp/matrix.tsv" --output "$tmp/logo.svg" --matrix-type probability --color-scheme classic --title smoke; test -s "$tmp/logo.svg"; grep -F '<svg' "$tmp/logo.svg" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-logomaker-alignment-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf '>s1
ACGTAC
>s2
ACGTTC
>s3
ACGTGC
>s4
ACGTAC
' > "$tmp/aln.fa"; logomaker alignment --input "$tmp/aln.fa" --output "$tmp/logo.png" --to-type information --color-scheme classic; test -s "$tmp/logo.png"; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-logomaker-demo-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; logomaker demo --name logo --output "$tmp/demo.pdf" >/tmp/taf-logomaker-demo.log 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/demo.pdf"; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-logomaker-demo.log

upstream.name: Logomaker
upstream.citation: Tareen A and Kinney JB. Logomaker: beautiful sequence logos in Python. Bioinformatics 36(7):2272-2274 (2020).
